channel.title: Waldo County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. The URL pattern suggested by search (/department/registry-of-probate/) 404s; this numeric CivicEngage path, found via the site's own sitemap, is the correct working URL.

item.title: Monitoring started: Waldo County Probate Court
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
